name: BROOM TREE RETREAT AND CONFERENCE CENTER

violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee putting on gloves without washing her hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Observed food employee enter the kitchen with gloved hands and did not change the gloves before putting dishes away. Gloves should be changed when switching tasks.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Cookies, parmesan cheese, and cheese bread were found on the lunch line without covers or other protection from consumer contamination. Food items on display for self service should be protected from contamination.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
